title: [InstCombine][AArch64] Lower NEON shift intrinsics when possible

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <8 x i16> @llvm.aarch64.neon.sshl.v8i16(<8 x i16>, <8 x i16>) #0

define <8 x i16> @sshl_i16_max_right(<8 x i16> %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sshl_i16_max_right(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RESULT:%.*]] = ashr <8 x i16> [[A:%.*]], splat (i16 15)
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <8 x i16> [[RESULT]]
  %result = call <8 x i16> @llvm.aarch64.neon.sshl.v8i16(<8 x i16> %a, <8 x i16> <i16 -15, i16 -15, i16 -15, i16 -15, i16 -15, i16 -15, i16 -15, i16 -15>)
  ret <8 x i16> %result
}
